prompt: Create a retro 8-bit RPG UI with pixel art character stats, item menu, and turn-based battle layout. Use character sprite format from the first image and dialogue box style from the second.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a retro 8-bit pixel art RPG turn-based battle user interface. The UI should display a central battle area, alongside distinct sections for character stats and an item menu. All character sprites rendered in the scene, including player characters and enemies, must adopt the small, front-facing 8-bit pixel art style exemplified by image 1. Furthermore, incorporate a dialogue box whose border design replicates the hand-drawn, slightly irregular outline seen in image 2.
objects: Player characters (small, front-facing, 8-bit pixel art style)
Enemy characters (small, front-facing, 8-bit pixel art style)
Dialogue box border (hand-drawn, slightly irregular outline)
